name: Reducto
mcp_notes: Reducto provides an official Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for integration with AI agent workflows.

evidence.claim: Reducto provides a complete toolkit for classification, parsing, extraction, splitting, editing, and workflow orchestration via a REST API.
Reducto integrates directly into AI agent workflows via the MCP server.
Search citation: Parse | Turn Any Document into Structured Data | Reducto
Search citation: Reducto: The Agentic Document Platform for AI Teams

auth_notes: Authentication is performed via the Authorization: Bearer $REDUCTO_API_KEY header.
api_notes: The API provides a comprehensive set of endpoints for the full document lifecycle including parsing, extraction, splitting, classification, editing, and pipeline orchestration. SDKs exist for Python, Node.js, and Go, alongside direct REST support.
access_notes: Developers can create a free account at studio.reducto.ai to generate API keys.
one_liner: Reducto is an agentic document platform that provides a toolkit for classification, parsing, extraction, splitting, and editing of documents into structured data for AI teams.
